_comment: CHAMPION v7 KING++ on 2b89b33: CANONICAL arch + king #865 readout + king #1271 muonWD 0.05/WSD 45% tail/embed adamw + beta1 0.75 + softcap 15 + iso-endgame 2x-peak (max_lr 1.6e-3/muon 0.08/embed 0.012, 1-qrt tail, peak*alpha=4e-4==king) + min_lr 5e-6 + held-out MINIMUM (val_frac 0.02, 200pts every 48, in-mem best-ckpt) + det-off. 9600 steps (2.52B tok), sized to op1 wall 12141s at measured 222.7K tok/s (~3.2% margin).
